legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.disclaimer: This site is published solely as a demonstration of the SMTools project. It is designed for anyone who needs it to host their own instance. It has no commercial purpose and is not intended as a public service. You may use it directly, but its main purpose is to serve as a reference and starting point for self-hosted deployments.
legal.privacyText:
**Data Controller:** {{owner}}  
**Contact:** [{{email}}](mailto:{{email}})

**Purpose and Legal Basis:** We process your personal data (name, email, and avatar obtained from Google or GitHub) for authentication and platform operation, based on your consent (Article 6.1.a GDPR) upon registration and the performance of the service contract (Article 6.1.b GDPR).

**Data Retention:** Personal data is retained while your account is active. You may download a copy of your data from your profile page ([`/tools/profile`](/tools/profile)) and delete it. When you delete your account from the profile page, all associated data is permanently removed.

**Recipients and International Transfers:** We use Google and GitHub as identity providers. When you log in via these services, your profile data is transferred to Google LLC or GitHub Inc. in the United States under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework (adequacy decision). We do not share your data with other third parties except where required by law.

**Your Rights:** You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, restriction, portability, and objection through your profile page ([`/tools/profile`](/tools/profile)) —where you can edit your data, export it, or delete your account— or by writing to [{{email}}](mailto:{{email}}).

**Change audit:** Based on our legitimate interest (Article 6.1.f GDPR) in ensuring the security, integrity, and proper functioning of the platform, we log the actions you perform within the application (creation, modification, and deletion of content), including your IP address, the type of element modified, the previous and new values of the change, and the timestamp. This data is retained for 30 days both in the database and in backups, after which it is automatically deleted. Sensitive data such as passwords, tokens, or secrets are excluded from logging. You may view your action history and export it alongside your other data from your profile page ([`/tools/profile`](/tools/profile)).

**Supervisory Authority:** If you believe we have not processed your data lawfully, you may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
legal.cookiesText:
This application only uses technical cookies that are strictly necessary for authentication and session management. These cookies are exempt from consent under Article 22.2 of Law 34/2002 (LSSICE) and AEPD guidelines.

ASP.NET Core session cookies are set upon login and expire when you close your browser. No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used.

You may configure your browser to block all cookies, but this will prevent the application from functioning correctly.
